$comment: Deprecated zero-overhead lifecycle extension point. Default scripts arrays stay empty and this is not part of the Codex/Claude harness runtime path.

pre-init.description: Runs before project initialization. Failure aborts init.

post-init.description: Runs after project initialization. Failure is a warning only.

pre-assemble.description: Runs before template assembly. Failure aborts assembly.

post-assemble.description: Runs after template assembly. Failure is a warning only.

pre-migrate.description: Runs before project migration. Failure aborts migration.

post-migrate.description: Runs after project migration. Failure is a warning only.

on-version-change.description: Runs when a version change is detected. Failure is a warning only.
